benefits.description: Used BPC/TB primarily to heal nerve injury in hands and post-surgical soft tissue recovery
Felt loads better and energy returned after peptides; body not struggling as much to heal
GHK-Cu used for skin; looks a couple years younger a few months in
Energy return noted after soft tissue healing burden was reduced

protocol_notes: Started BPC/TB 2.5 months post total hysterectomy; started GH secretagogues 3 months post-op. Noted concern about elevated GH potentially slowing soft tissue healing (observed acne takes longer to heal). Recommends waiting until soft tissue is free of stitches before GH secretagogues. Surgery involved internal stitches that take 6+ months to dissolve with soft tissue and ligament reattachment.
